de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction

Interface Field

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Member, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement, Variable
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    FieldSpecification, ImplicitFieldSpecification

    public interface Field
extends Variable, Member
    A program model element representing fields.
    Author:
    AL, RN The file has been modified by the KeY team.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getProgramName()
      returns the name of the field as used in programs.
      IProgramVariable getProgramVariable()
      returns the program variable associated with this field

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.java.abstraction.Variable

        getType, isFinal

    • Method Detail

      • getProgramVariable

        IProgramVariable getProgramVariable()
        returns the program variable associated with this field
        Returns:
        the program variable associated with this field

      • getProgramName

        String getProgramName()
        returns the name of the field as used in programs. In the logic each field has a unique name which is composed by the class name where it is declared and its source code name
        Returns:
        returns the name of the field as used in programs
